criteria_verification.criterion_text: Walks the `supersedes` chain via `chain_resolver` (lookup by entity_id)
criteria_verification.evidence: assert_no_cycle iterates from new_adjustment.supersedes upward, calling chain_resolver(str(current_id)) once per step. Test test_walks_via_chain_resolver_lookup asserts the resolver is invoked with str(entity_id) keys in walk order.
criteria_verification.notes: assert_no_cycle iterates from new_adjustment.supersedes upward, calling chain_resolver(str(current_id)) once per step. Test test_walks_via_chain_resolver_lookup asserts the resolver is invoked with str(entity_id) keys in walk order.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Uses a `set[str]` of visited entity_ids; cycle detected when a visited
criteria_verification.evidence: Implementation declares `visited: set[str]` seeded with str(new_adjustment.entity_id) and raises SupersessionCycleError on re-entry. Tests test_cycle_of_length_two_raises and test_cycle_of_length_five_raises exercise both short and longer cycles.
criteria_verification.notes: Implementation declares `visited: set[str]` seeded with str(new_adjustment.entity_id) and raises SupersessionCycleError on re-entry. Tests test_cycle_of_length_two_raises and test_cycle_of_length_five_raises exercise both short and longer cycles.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Configurable `max_depth` (default 10); chain longer than depth raises
criteria_verification.evidence: max_depth parameter defaults to 10 and is configurable. After max_depth iterations with chain still active, raises SupersessionCycleError with formatted chain path and depth. Tests test_chain_of_depth_eleven_raises_at_default_cap and test_max_depth_is_configurable cover both branches.
criteria_verification.notes: max_depth parameter defaults to 10 and is configurable. After max_depth iterations with chain still active, raises SupersessionCycleError with formatted chain path and depth. Tests test_chain_of_depth_eleven_raises_at_default_cap and test_max_depth_is_configurable cover both branches.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Clean linear chains (no cycles, depth ≤ 10) return None
criteria_verification.evidence: Function returns None when supersedes is None, when resolver returns None for an unknown ancestor, or when chain terminates within max_depth. Tests test_no_supersedes_returns_none, test_short_linear_chain_returns_none, and test_chain_at_max_depth_returns_none all assert result is None.
criteria_verification.notes: Function returns None when supersedes is None, when resolver returns None for an unknown ancestor, or when chain terminates within max_depth. Tests test_no_supersedes_returns_none, test_short_linear_chain_returns_none, and test_chain_at_max_depth_returns_none all assert result is None.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Self-supersession (`new.supersedes == new.entity_id`) is a special case
criteria_verification.evidence: Implementation checks self-supersession before any resolver invocation and raises SupersessionCycleError with a dedicated message. Test test_self_supersession_raises_immediately verifies (a) the error is raised and (b) the resolver was never called.
criteria_verification.notes: Implementation checks self-supersession before any resolver invocation and raises SupersessionCycleError with a dedicated message. Test test_self_supersession_raises_immediately verifies (a) the error is raised and (b) the resolver was never called.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Error message includes the cycle path for operator debugging
criteria_verification.evidence: All three SupersessionCycleError raise sites include the path (joined with ' -> ') or the offending entity id. test_cycle_of_length_five_raises asserts every node id appears in the message; test_self_supersession_raises_immediately asserts the offending id appears.
criteria_verification.notes: All three SupersessionCycleError raise sites include the path (joined with ' -> ') or the offending entity id. test_cycle_of_length_five_raises asserts every node id appears in the message; test_self_supersession_raises_immediately asserts the offending id appears.

criteria_verification.evidence: Both new files pass `black --check`, `ruff check`, and `mypy` with zero issues. Verified locally: black reports '2 files would be left unchanged', ruff reports 'All checks passed!', mypy reports 'Success: no issues found in 1 source file'.
criteria_verification.notes: Both new files pass `black --check`, `ruff check`, and `mypy` with zero issues. Verified locally: black reports '2 files would be left unchanged', ruff reports 'All checks passed!', mypy reports 'Success: no issues found in 1 source file'.

issues.description:
Advisory (non-blocking): task-work produced a report with 2 of 3 expected agent invocations. Missing phases: 3 (Implementation). Consider invoking these agents via the Task tool to strengthen stack-specific quality:
- Phase 3: `python-api-specialist` (Implementation)
No seam tests detected for cross-boundary feature. Consider adding seam/contract/boundary tests to validate technology boundary interactions. This is a recommendation, not a blocking gate.

rationale: All quality gates passed. Conditionally approved — test collection errors in independent verification. All Player quality gates passed. All acceptance criteria met. Architecture context: 381 chars provided.
